heading: Denial of capital gain treatment for gains on certain obligations not in registered form
label: 1287 Denial of capital gain treatment for gains on certain obligations not in registered form
notes: Amendments2010—Subsec. (b)(1). struck out “except that clause (iv) of subparagraph (A), and subparagraph (B), of such section shall not apply” before period.Pub. L. 111–147

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: If any registration-required obligation is not in registered form, any gain on the sale or other disposition of such obligation shall be treated as ordinary income (unless the issuance of such obligation was subject to tax under section 4701).

children.heading: Registration-required obligation
children.label: 1 Registration-required obligation
children.text: The term “registration-required obligation” has the meaning given to such term by section 163(f)(2).

children.heading: Registered form
children.label: 2 Registered form
children.text: The term “registered form” has the same meaning as when used in section 163(f).
